overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district in Night City. The character traverses a pedestrian overpass, transitioning from an industrial zone with heavy metal structures into a commercial area with digital billboards and street traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with metal archway entrance

agents.ego_description: Walking steadily along the orange-brown pavement toward a large industrial structure with a pedestrian overpass entrance

notable_agents.action: Walking ahead toward the overpass entrance, maintaining distance

entered.detail: Large industrial building with red and blue DR logo signage on facade
Heavy industrial metal frame forming an arch over the walkway entrance
Multi-level industrial building with yellow painted structural sections
Tall concrete wall running alongside the pedestrian path
Dense network of industrial pipes and power lines overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide industrial street with orange-brown pavement under bright midday sun. The path leads toward a massive industrial complex marked with a DR logo, framed by a heavy metal arch structure. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead, and industrial buildings flank both sides of the street.

events.description: Entering covered concrete stairway leading to pedestrian overpass
Ascending steep concrete stairs with metal railings on both sides
Descending stairs on the opposite side toward street level

agents.ego_description: Traversing the covered pedestrian bridge, climbing stairs and walking through the dimly lit concrete corridor with fluorescent lighting

notable_agents.action: Descending the stairs in the opposite direction through the covered walkway

entered.detail: Enclosed concrete pedestrian bridge with solid roof and side openings
Wide concrete stairs with textured non-slip surface
Vertical fluorescent tube lights mounted on concrete walls
Large orange and silver utility pipes running along the walkway wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to artificial fluorescent lighting. The environment is a narrow concrete corridor with exposed industrial pipes and vertical light fixtures. The character ascends stairs, crosses the bridge level, then descends on the opposite side while other pedestrians pass in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with digital advertising

events.description: Exiting covered walkway back to sunlit street level in commercial district
Approaching intersection with moderate vehicle traffic and crossing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: Walking along the busy sidewalk toward a large intersection, passing an NCPD officer and navigating through pedestrian crowds

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing on the sidewalk observing street activity
Pedestrian with bright green hair walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: Large vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
Street sign displaying CITY 40 speed limit
Concrete commercial building with multiple windows and ground floor access
Metal framework of the pedestrian overpass just exited, viewed from below

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit commercial street with moderate pedestrian traffic. A large digital billboard dominates the view ahead, while an NCPD officer stands watch on the left sidewalk. The character walks toward a busy intersection with moving vehicle traffic and crossing pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright industrial zone through a sheltered transit corridor and into a bustling commercial district. It begins on a wide street with orange-brown pavement, moving under the midday sun toward a massive industrial complex framed by a heavy metal arch. As the character enters a covered pedestrian overpass, the bright daylight shifts to artificial fluorescent lighting within a narrow concrete corridor of exposed pipes and stairs. The scene then opens back into the sunlight as the camera emerges from the walkway onto a commercial street dominated by a large digital billboard and the presence of an NCPD officer. Finally, the movement leads toward a busy intersection filled with moving vehicle traffic and crossing pedestrians.
